rationale: Claude enrollment progress now uses asynchronous transitions through saving_secret and updating_profile before ready, so the lifecycle states can render visibly.
Manual Claude token submission now uses a TanStack useMutation with mutation callbacks for loading, success, and error state management.
The Claude enrollment surface now renders as a fixed drawer overlay with dialog semantics, modal backdrop behavior, initial focus, and Escape/backdrop close handling.
Enrollment mutation callbacks are scoped to the submitting profile and ignore stale responses after another profile drawer is opened.
Submitted tokens are cleared when submission starts and remain cleared on failed retry entry.
Review summary only; the referenced actionable items are tracked by their individual review comments.
Automated review summary only; the actionable Codex comments are tracked by their individual review comments.
